caption: A screen recording captures a web browser displaying the website RANDOM.ORG. The page features a "List Randomizer" with a numbered list of names, including "Michael Loguericio," "Carl Hagdorm," and "Steve Merrick." A sidebar on the left contains a chat log with messages from "glowbug27" and "Nightbot," the latter stating, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/NzSdeK9Y." The bottom of the screen displays a red and white banner for "JAYPS CASEBREAKS.COM." As the video progresses, the view shifts from a detailed list of names and timestamps to a zoomed-out perspective of the RANDOM.ORG homepage, which includes navigation links like "Games," "Numbers," and "Lists & More." A yellow advisory warning is visible, stating, "We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." The scene eventually transitions back to the detailed list and chat sidebar.
